mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (sender_id, receiver_id, group_id, message_type, content, status, created_at) VALUES ( #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{groupId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdAt,typeHandler=com.example.chatterserver.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler} )

INSERT INTO files ( message_id, file_name, stored_file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, md5, upload_time ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{fileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{md5}, #{uploadTime,typeHandler=com.example.chatterserver.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.message_id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.group_id, m.message_type, m.content, m.status, m.created_at FROM messages m WHERE m.receiver_id IS NOT NULL AND m.group_id IS NULL AND (m.sender_id = #{userId} OR m.receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY m.created_at ASC

SELECT m.message_id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.group_id, m.message_type, m.content, m.status, m.created_at FROM messages m WHERE m.receiver_id IS NULL AND m.group_id IS NULL ORDER BY m.created_at ASC
SELECT m.message_id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.group_id, m.message_type, m.content, m.status, m.created_at FROM messages m WHERE m.message_id = #{messageId}
SELECT file_id, message_id, file_name, stored_file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, md5, upload_time FROM files WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
SELECT file_id, message_id, file_name, stored_file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, md5, upload_time FROM files WHERE stored_file_name = #{storedFileName}

SELECT m.message_id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.group_id, m.message_type, m.content, m.status, m.created_at FROM messages m JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = m.group_id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
